engine_report.goal: Fix the send-money internal top-up flow so it shows preflight rate / quote economics and the required top-up amount before asking the user to fund their wallet.

inspect_current_quote_gap.summary: Inspected the insufficient-balance path, found it compared wallet USD directly to fiat send amount, and confirmed the repo already exposes an authenticated /best-offer preflight endpoint via the frontend.
inspect_current_quote_gap.root_cause: The internal top-up path surfaced username-only instructions after a raw balance check. It did not fetch best-offer economics before blocking, so the user never saw the required top-up amount or rate basis early enough.
inspect_current_quote_gap.quote_source: Use the existing authenticated trades /best-offer endpoint keyed by payment_details_id for a route-specific preflight estimate before trade creation.

design_preflight_quote_fix.summary: Locked a design that ensures payment detail before the insufficient-balance branch, fetches the current best-offer estimate, and reuses the same quote basis in confirmation + internal top-up guidance.
design_notes: Add a PreflightQuote model and client method that wraps the existing /best-offer endpoint.
Persist quote + paymentDetailsId in execution.preflight so the flow can reuse them after top-up and during trade creation.
Always label the preview as an estimate because the backend exposes a live best offer, not a locked quote.
flow_sequence: show balance + rate basis + shortfall + estimate caveat
offer internal username top-up or external deposit

implement_preflight_quote_fix.summary: Implemented preflight quote loading, richer insufficient-balance / internal top-up copy, trade-request reuse of the quoted crypto amount, and docs/test updates.

validate_preflight_quote_fix.summary: Ran the transfer orchestrator regression suite plus import smoke checks after the code/docs changes.
test_results: Module import smoke check passed for unigox-client.ts and transfer-orchestrator.ts.

commit_preflight_quote_fix.summary: Committed the send-money preflight quote UX fix in the skill repo.
